title: POV: You Decorated Your Apartment for Yourself Instead of Instagram
description:
Terracotta walls. Vintage posters that actually mean something. A swirly rug your mom would call "loud." Plants that are still alive (barely). And a candle warmer that looks like it time-traveled from 1972 in the best way.
This is what happens when you stop asking "will this get saves" and start asking "does this make me happy when I get home from work."
The MEVA lamp fits right into the whole retro situation—orb shape, chrome details, that warm amber glow that makes everything look like a Wes Anderson film. No flame, all fragrance, fully committed to the aesthetic.
Your space should feel like you. Not like everyone else's saved pins.
prompt_seed: aesthetic, cozy interior, warm soft lighting, minimal clutter, Pinterest-worthy

title: Cozy Open Plan Living Room Setup Perfect for Family Movie Nights and Real Life
description: Transform your family space into the ultimate cozy gathering spot with this warm, inviting open-plan living room designed for both style and real family life. The generous L-shaped sectional in soft greige provides comfortable seating for everyone, while warm ambient lighting from strategically placed table lamps and glowing candles creates magical atmosphere without harsh overhead lighting. A round wooden coffee table styled with candles and chunky knit throws becomes an irresistible centerpiece for family evenings. The natural wood media console keeps entertainment organized while adding essential warmth, and woven baskets with greenery bring life throughout the space. This is beautifully functional design that works for both daily family life and sophisticated entertaining.
